q: Impact of new trade barriers on Q3 margin
diagnostic: A tariff change at the border should trigger a production spec change on the floor within hours. A boardroom with Throughput analyst and Capital Steward agents bridges the gap between geopolitics and shop floor scheduling in real time.
answer: A tariff change at the border should trigger a production spec change on the floor within hours. A boardroom with Throughput analyst and Capital Steward agents bridges the gap between geopolitics and shop floor scheduling in real time.
description: Brittle integration — as systems become more automated, they become more fragile. Geopolitical volatility compresses planning horizons to 48 hours.
symptom: One tariff change disrupts the quarter. One API outage stops the factory. The CEO no longer understands how their own company works.
